action.reasoning: Observation: ViT-B/16 massively overfits (0.675 val vs 0.84 test with ConvNeXt-Tiny). Analysis: ViT too large for 32x32 upscaled images, ConvNeXt-Tiny is better suited. Decision: Revert to ConvNeXt-Tiny with improved training: two-stage (representation then balanced), stronger regularization, EMA. Train ~20 epochs with 160x160 for speed.
